---
title: "Foundation Topics"
---

## Why This Track Matters

The foundation track is where you build fluency strong enough that later theory stops feeling like a wall of symbols.

## First Modules

- [Proofs](proofs/index.qmd)
- [Linear Algebra](linear-algebra/index.qmd)
- [Probability](probability/index.qmd)

These are the first starter modules scaffolded in this version of the site.
